headline: Wynn Resorts Announces First Quarter Earnings Release Date
summary: Wynn Resorts, Limited (NASDAQ: WYNN) announced today that it will release the Company's financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026 after the market close on Thursday, May 7, 2026, followed by a conference call at 1:30 p.m. PT (4:30 p.m. ET).
